summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is ~40% complete, missing test files (tests/ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1, tests/Workflow.Tests.ps1), fixture data (fixtures/*.json), .actrc config, and act-result.txt. Task requires TDD+tests-first; no test files provided. Workflow syntax appears sound (Set-StrictMode, error handling, proper pwsh shell usage), but cannot validate since fixtures don't exist and tests weren't written first per TDD requirement. Code quality of what exists is 4/5 (clear naming, good separation, robust error handling), but the solution cannot execute. Assertion loop (Test-Workflow.ps1 ~120-145) could refactor to helper function. Without the missing ~40%, this fails the fundamental 'code that actually runs' requirement.
